name: Clear Ribbed Acrylic Makeup Organizer - Threshold™
description:
Neatly store all your makeup essentials in one spot with the Clear Ribbed Acrylic Makeup Organizer from Threshold™. This clear makeup organizer features a ribbed design for a classic touch, while the multiple divided compartments help provide ample space for your makeup brushes, lipstick and more. Made of acrylic, this makeup organizer makes a practical addition to your vanity.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
